case_title: BRADLEY KAPLAN ET AL VS. ARTHUR D FULTON

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAPLAN, BRADLEY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2021 - JUDGMENT. COURT DISCLOSURE IS GIVEN. PLAINTIFF'S BRADY AND DANA KAPALN ARE PRESENT VIA ZOOM APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT ARTHUR FULTON IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAPLAN, BRADLEY AS TO DEFENDANT FULTON, ARTHUR D
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $552.00 FILED BY KAPLAN, BRADLEY KAPLAN, DANA AS TO DEFENDANT FULTON, ARTHUR D ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-06-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-06-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUL-30-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS BRADLEY AND DANA KAPLAN ARE PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT ARTHUR D. FULTON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES ERVICE ISSUES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD IN MAIL SUBMITTED BY PLANTIFF.
ORDER CASE CONTINUED PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAPLAN, BRADLEY KAPLAN, DANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FULTON, ARTHUR D $552.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $582.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
